executionValidation: Every Linux Course 1 code_input must use recipeType shell_task and mode terminal_workspace.
File-changing tasks validate folders/files from the workspace snapshot with workspaceExpectations.
Output-only command tasks may validate command history/current output with terminalExpectations.
Do not use workspace_expectations as a recipe name; it is an expectation payload under shell_task.
Do not require stdout tests or Judge0 Bash execution for Course 1 terminal_workspace checks.
pedagogy: Keep tasks visible in the file explorer.
Prefer mkdir, touch, cp, mv, cat, head, tail, wc, pwd, ls, and cd for Course 1.
